title: OPTY PVP
description: Pvp, Optimization and no more laggy serverss
body: OPTY PVP is a lightweight, optimized modpack for laggy servers, pvp, low fps and annoying input lag. If you are even advanced pvp gamer you can use this modpack both of client and servers. I am pvp player too and I make this modpack for pvp players (My brothers) you can trust this modpack=)
